concerns.text: T010 implements checksums in src/data/checksums.yaml but Constitution III requires checksums recorded in state/projects/PROJ-573-https-arxiv-org-abs-2604-27351.yaml artifact_hashes map. Task violates Single Source of Truth principle.
T019 implements statistical tests but FR-014 requires effect sizes with 95% CI as PRIMARY outcome alongside paired t-test. Task doesn't verify effect size calculation or primary outcome designation.
T024 covers seed/version logging but FR-005 requires logging 'random seeds, model versions, AND environment details'. Environment details logging is not explicitly addressed in task.
T050 verifies reproducibility across 5 seeds but SC-004 requires 'mean accuracy differences fall within a 95% CI (statistical equivalence)'. Task lacks clear acceptance criteria for CI width.
T001 'Create project structure per implementation plan' is too coarse - doesn't specify exact files/directories to create. Atomizer will need to split this.
T003 'Configure linting and formatting tools' is too vague - doesn't specify config file names (e.g., ruff.toml, pyproject.toml) or exact settings.
T044 'Documentation updates in quickstart.md and data-model.md' is too vague - doesn't specify what updates are needed or which sections to modify.
T045 'Code cleanup and refactoring across src/' is too coarse - doesn't specify what cleanup or refactoring is needed. Atomizer will need to split this.
Model size constraints (< 1 GB) are referenced in tasks but verification of actual model weights is only mentioned in Phase 0.5 research - no explicit task to validate weights before implementation.
